```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.95em;">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">how skills handle it</div>
  <div style="font-size:1em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1;">Progressive disclosure.</div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 0.15fr 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.4em;">step 01 · always-loaded</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.65em;color:#2C3E50;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.5em;">Just metadata</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.25em;">
    <div style="background:#F8F7F0;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;border-radius:6px;padding:0.3em 0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;vertical-align:-0.15em;"></i> Skill A: search</div>
    <div style="background:#F8F7F0;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;border-radius:6px;padding:0.3em 0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;vertical-align:-0.15em;"></i> Skill B: data analysis</div>
    <div style="background:#F8F7F0;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;border-radius:6px;padding:0.3em 0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;vertical-align:-0.15em;"></i> Skill C: charting</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;text-align:center;">→</div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);border:2px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#2C8475;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.4em;">step 02 · on trigger</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.65em;color:#2C3E50;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.5em;">Dynamic load</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.25em;">
    <div style="background:#F8F7F0;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;border-radius:6px;padding:0.3em 0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;opacity:0.5;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;vertical-align:-0.15em;"></i> Skill A</div>
    <div style="background:#E5F2EE;border:1.5px solid #2C8475;border-radius:6px;padding:0.3em 0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;vertical-align:-0.15em;"></i> Skill B → full body <i data-lucide="brain" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;vertical-align:-0.15em;"></i></div>
    <div style="background:#F8F7F0;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;border-radius:6px;padding:0.3em 0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;opacity:0.5;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;vertical-align:-0.15em;"></i> Skill C</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.95em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.45em;text-align:center;">
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;border-top:2px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">on demand</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.2em;">only what the task needs</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;border-top:2px solid #7B2CBF;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#7B2CBF;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">layered</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.2em;">metadata → details → assets</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;border-top:2px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">at the right time</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.2em;">when actually triggered</div>
  </div>
 </div>

</div>
```
